script: for B in emily-claude neil-claude stephanie-claude; do echo "========== $B =========="; D=/home/azureuser/.${B}-bot; echo "  service: $(systemctl is-active ${B}-responder.service) (pid=$(systemctl show ${B}-responder.service -p MainPID --value), uptime $(systemctl show ${B}-responder.service -p ActiveEnterTimestamp --value))"; echo "  offset: $(cat $D/responder-offset.txt 2>/dev/null)"; echo "  activities: $(wc -l < $D/activities.jsonl)"; echo "  outbound: $(wc -l < $D/outbound.jsonl 2>/dev/null || echo 'no file')"; echo "  ----- last activity entry parsed (was the synthetic one valid?) -----"; tail -1 $D/activities.jsonl | python3 -c "import sys, json; raw=sys.stdin.read(); env=json.loads(raw); body=json.loads(env['body']); print('  type:', body.get('type')); print('  from.aadObjectId:', body.get('from', {}).get('aadObjectId')); print('  conv.conversationType:', body.get('conversation', {}).get('conversationType')); ents=body.get('entities', []); ms=[e for e in ents if e.get('type')=='mention']; print('  mention count:', len(ms)); [print('    mention.id:', m.get('mentioned', {}).get('id')) for m in ms]" 2>&1; echo "  ----- BOT_FROM_ID expected by responder -----"; grep -E 'BOT_APP_ID|BOT_FROM_ID' /home/azureuser/${B}-responder.py | head -2; echo "  ----- recent debug log -----"; tail -5 $D/responder-debug.log; echo "  ----- recent errors -----"; tail -3 $D/responder-errors.log; echo; done
